name: conditional-get fetcher: a 304 response skips the parse and diff pipeline
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --body-hash h1 >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 304
